```{r Attach packages, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("../common/load-neoipcr.R")
load_neoipcr(dev_pkg_path = "../../../neoipcr")
source("../common/helpers.R")
suppressMessages(library(tidyverse, warn.conflicts = FALSE, quietly = TRUE))
```

```{r Initialise locale dependent information}
#| include: false

if(!exists("params")) params <- list()

locale <- Sys.getenv("LC_ALL")
localeObj <- parse_locales(locale)[[1]]
invisible(Sys.setlocale(category = "LC_ALL", locale = locale))
invisible(Sys.setLanguage(localeObj$language))
language <- localeObj$language
sR <- get_string_resources(localeObj)

departmentFilter <- params$departmentFilter
NeoIPC_ProgramId <- "D8mSSpOpsKj"
support_email_address <- "NeoIPC-Support@charite.de"
```

```{r Data Import, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
connection_options <- get_connection_options(
  scheme = params$dhis2Scheme,
  hostname = params$dhis2Hostname,
  port = params$dhis2Port,
  path = params$dhis2Path)

dataset_options <- neoipcr::dhis2_dataset_options(
  department_filter = departmentFilter,
  include_department = "full",
  include_hospital = "full",
  include_country = "full",
  include_world_bank_class = "full",
  include_patient = "full",
  patient_columns = c("id", "sex", "birth_weight", "gestational_age",
                       "delivery_mode", "siblings"),
  include_enrollment = "full",
  include_event = "full",
  include_dhis2_ids = c("departments","patients","enrollments","events"),
  include_incomplete = c("enrollments","events"),
  include_test_data = isTRUE(params$includeTestData),
  include_ineligible_patients = TRUE,
  include_unenrolled_patients = TRUE,
  include_invalid_patients = TRUE,
  locale = locale)

data <- neoipcr::import_dhis2(
  connection_options = connection_options,
  dataset_options = dataset_options)
```

```{r Filter metadata to in-scope departments}
#| include: false

# departmentFilter narrows which departments the validation runs over.
# When NULL, every department returned by import_dhis2 is in scope.
departments <- data$metadata$departments
if (!rlang::is_null(departmentFilter))
  departments <- departments |>
    dplyr::filter(.data$code %in% departmentFilter)
```

```{r Load and key-transform validation exceptions}
#| include: false

# User-supplied exceptions arrive in CSV form with
# RULE_ID, DEPARTMENT_CODE, NEOIPC_PATIENT_ID, ENROLMENT_DATE, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_DATE.
# Translate once here into key form (rule_id, patient_key, enrollment_key, event_key)
# so rule files can anti_join on keys only.
exception_cols <- tibble(
  rule_id        = integer(),
  patient_key    = integer(),
  enrollment_key = integer(),
  event_key      = integer())

exceptions <- exception_cols

if (!is.null(params$validationExceptionFile) &&
    file.exists(params$validationExceptionFile)) {
  raw_exceptions <- readr::read_csv(
    params$validationExceptionFile,
    col_types = "iccDcD",
    show_col_types = FALSE)

  expected_cols <- c("RULE_ID", "DEPARTMENT_CODE", "NEOIPC_PATIENT_ID",
                     "ENROLMENT_DATE", "EVENT_TYPE", "EVENT_DATE")
  actual_cols <- names(raw_exceptions)
  if (!identical(actual_cols, expected_cols)) {
    rlang::abort(c(
      sprintf("Validation exception file has unexpected columns: '%s'",
              params$validationExceptionFile),
      i = paste("Expected:", paste(expected_cols, collapse = ", ")),
      i = paste("Got:",      paste(actual_cols, collapse = ", "))))
  }

  if (nrow(raw_exceptions) > 0) {
    # Map DEPARTMENT_CODE → department_key
    with_dept <- raw_exceptions |>
      dplyr::inner_join(
        data$metadata$departments |>
          dplyr::select("department_key", "code"),
        dplyr::join_by("DEPARTMENT_CODE" == "code"))

    # Map (department_key, NEOIPC_PATIENT_ID) → patient_key
    with_pat <- with_dept |>
      dplyr::left_join(
        data$patients |>
          dplyr::select("department_key", "patient_key", "patient_id"),
        dplyr::join_by("department_key",
          "NEOIPC_PATIENT_ID" == "patient_id"))

    # Map (patient_key, ENROLMENT_DATE) → enrollment_key
    with_enr <- with_pat |>
      dplyr::left_join(
        data$enrollments |>
          dplyr::select("patient_key", "enrollment_key", "enrolledAt"),
        dplyr::join_by("patient_key",
          "ENROLMENT_DATE" == "enrolledAt"))

    # Map (enrollment_key, EVENT_TYPE, EVENT_DATE) → event_key via events
    # EVENT_TYPE in the CSV is ADM/PRO/BSI/NEC/SSI/HAP/END; event_type_key is
    # lower-cased factor adm/pro/bsi/nec/ssi/hap/end.
    with_evt <- with_enr |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        event_type_key = factor(
          tolower(.data$EVENT_TYPE),
          levels = c("adm","pro","bsi","nec","ssi","hap","end"))) |>
      dplyr::left_join(
        data$events |>
          dplyr::select("enrollment_key", "event_type_key",
            "event_key", "occurredAt"),
        dplyr::join_by("enrollment_key", "event_type_key",
          "EVENT_DATE" == "occurredAt"))

    exceptions <- with_evt |>
      dplyr::mutate(
        rule_id        = as.integer(.data$RULE_ID),
        patient_key    = .data$patient_key,
        enrollment_key = .data$enrollment_key,
        event_key      = .data$event_key,
        .keep = "none")
  }
} else if (!is.null(params$validationExceptionFile)) {
  rlang::abort(sprintf(
    "Validation exception file not found: '%s'",
    params$validationExceptionFile))
}
```

```{r Initialise empty problems tibble}
#| include: false

# Modern problem shape: keys plus a per-rule context list-column.
# Identifier resolution (SITE_CODE, DEPARTMENT_NAME, NEOIPC_PATIENT_ID,
# PATIENT_TEI, ENROLMENT_ID, EVENT_ID, …) happens at render time in
# _problems.qmd by joining against metadata, patients, enrollments, events.
problems <- tibble::tibble(
  rule_id        = integer(),
  patient_key    = integer(),
  enrollment_key = integer(),
  event_key      = integer(),
  context        = list())
```
